name: NEW ENGLAND REALTY ASSOCIATES LIMITED PARTNERSHIP
summary: New England Realty Associates Limited Partnership (NERA) is a Massachusetts limited partnership engaged in acquiring, developing, holding, operating, and selling real estate. Through 34 subsidiary limited partnerships or LLCs, it owns and operates 3,411 residential apartment units in 27 complexes, 19 condominium units, approximately 138,000 square feet of commercial space, and a 40-50% interest in 7 joint venture properties with 688 residential units, primarily in the metropolitan Boston area of Massachusetts.

products.name: Residential Apartment Units
products.description: 3,411 residential apartment units in 27 complexes located primarily in metropolitan Boston, Massachusetts.

products.name: Condominium Units
products.description: 19 condominium units in a residential condominium complex, all leased to residential tenants.

products.name: Commercial Properties
products.description: Two commercial shopping centers in Framingham, commercial buildings in Newton and Brookline, and mixed-use commercial space totaling ~138,000 sq ft.

products.name: Investment Properties (Joint Ventures)
products.description: 40-50% interest in 7 residential and mixed-use complexes with 688 residential units in Massachusetts and New Hampshire.

partnerships.description: Engaged to perform general management functions for the Partnership's properties in exchange for management fees.
Provided a $156,000,000 Master Credit Facility at 2.97% fixed interest rate through December 31, 2031, secured by mortgages on certain properties.
